name: Hokuhoku Financial Group, Inc.
summary: Hokuhoku Financial Group, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking services to individuals, and small and medium-sized enterprises in Japan. The company offers various deposit products, including current, ordinary, savings, time, and installment savings, as well as deposits at notice and negotiable certificates of deposit; loans on bills and deeds; overdrafts; bills discounted; and a range of services, including leases, credit cards, loan guarantees, and venture capital. It also provides software development, document and cash management, and business processing solutions, as well as research on the regional economy, and survey research and consulting services. As of June 30, 2020, it operated 188 branches in Japan and 6 representative offices internationally. Hokuhoku Financial Group, Inc. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.
